processors.title: Data partners
processors.intro_text: To run SubRadar AI we work with the trusted companies below. Each one only receives the minimum data needed for its role. You can review what each processor does and read their privacy policy.
processors.rights_text: Under GDPR (EU) and CCPA (California) you have the right to access, export, or delete the data we hold about you. To exercise these rights contact support@subradar.ai or use Settings → Delete Account.

revenuecat.purpose: Processes in-app purchases and subscriptions on iOS / Android. Receives your subscription identifier, transaction receipts, and basic account ID.

openai.purpose: Powers AI features — voice transcription, screenshot parsing, smart subscription lookup. Receives the audio, image, or text you submit when using these features.

firebase.purpose: Delivers push notifications (renewal reminders, billing alerts). Receives a device push token tied to your account.

resend.purpose: Sends transactional email — sign-in links, receipts, weekly digests. Receives your email address and message metadata.

digitalocean.purpose: Hosts our API servers and database. Stores account, subscription, and analytics data at rest.

apple.purpose: When you sign in with Apple or buy via the App Store, Apple receives auth + purchase data per their policy.

google.purpose: When you sign in with Google or use Android, Google receives auth + push delivery data per their policy.

landing.hero_title: Know exactly where your money goes

paywall.team_access_msg: Your team subscription already unlocks every Pro feature. Buying your own Pro is only useful if you plan to leave the team. Apple may refuse the purchase while a team subscription is active on this Apple ID.
paywall.purchase_blocked_team: Apple may have refused because your Apple ID is tied to the team subscription. Try: 1) sign out/in of App Store, 2) use a personal Apple ID, or 3) leave the team first (Settings → Workspace).
paywall.sync_delayed_msg: Your Pro purchase is confirmed on Apple's side. Our server will finish activating it within a few minutes — you may need to reopen the app.
paywall.sync_retry_message: Your purchase went through on Apple's side, but the server hasn't confirmed the activation yet. Try again?

paywall.paid_disclaimer: Billed via App Store. Cancel anytime.
